title: New item import tool doesn't have a match function
excerpt:

posts.author: Bibby (Joseph Bibby)
posts.cookedHtml:
A new import item interface has appeared this week and it has lost the functionality of matching and overwrighting items based on matching data.
I have a large number of items that require an update to a column, is there a way to update them without deleting and re-uploading them all or manually adjusting each one?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Joseph,

I am happy to check internally on the new import feature as this feedback is really important as we further develop the feature.

That said, if you are looking to create bulk changes to a column, can you utilise our batch actions feature?

Let me know

posts.author: Bibby (Joseph Bibby)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

I’d appreciate you forwarding it to the developers. The batch actions feature is not applicable in this case because I was looking to update each of the items with unique data.

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ah my apologies for the inconvenience here Joseph

I wanted to let you know that the team are planning on developing an option to disable the new import in order to use the overwrite function. I will be sure to let you know when more information is shared with me. Thanks for your continued patience
